title: ThreatAssessment
description: Classification and priority score for one Track. Every assessment carries a human-readable rationale — explainability is an architectural requirement for a human-on-the-loop system.

track_id.description: Fusion track id (not a truth id)

label.description: Classification label. Friendlies may never reach 'hostile' without corroborating hostile behaviour.

priority_score.description: Threat priority. Dominant term is time-to-asset (lower tta -> higher score). Used by the allocator as the threat value estimate before Pillar B is wired in.

features.description: Extracted feature snapshot for audit / downstream consumers

why.description: Human-readable rationale string. Required on every assessment.
